// Array of program objects
export const programsData = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'BS Computer Science',
    duration: '4 Years',
    eligibility: 'Intermediate with Mathematics (Minimum 50% marks)',
    subjects: [
      'Data Structures & Algorithms',
      'Object Oriented Programming',
      'Database Management Systems',
      'Web Development',
      'Artificial Intelligence',
      'Software Engineering'
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'BS Data Science',
    duration: '4 Years',
    eligibility: 'Intermediate with Mathematics & Statistics (Minimum 50% marks)',
    subjects: [
      'Statistics & Probability',
      'Machine Learning',
      'Data Visualization',
      'Big Data Analytics',
      'Python for Data Science',
      'Deep Learning'
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'BS Artificial Intelligence',
    duration: '4 Years',
    eligibility: 'Intermediate with Mathematics (Minimum 50% marks)',
    subjects: [
      'Neural Networks',
      'Natural Language Processing',
      'Computer Vision',
      'Reinforcement Learning',
      'Robotics',
      'AI Ethics'
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'BS Informatics',
    duration: '4 Years',

    subjects: [
      'Information Systems',
      'Networking',

      'Database Design',
      'Project Management'

  },
  {
    id: 5,

    subjects: [
      'Network Security',

      'Risk Management'
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: 'MS Computer Science',
    duration: '2 Years',
    eligibility: 'BS Computer Science or related field (Minimum 50% CGPA)',
    subjects: [
      'Advanced Algorithms',
      'Distributed Systems',
      'Research Methods',
      'Cloud Architecture',
      'Advanced Database Systems',
      'Thesis'
    ]
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: 'MSc Artificial Intelligence',
    duration: '2 Years',
    eligibility: 'BS Computer Science/AI or related field (Minimum 50% CGPA)',
    subjects: [
      'Advanced Machine Learning',
      'Computer Vision Research',
